subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: I will pray God to assist you. It has often happened that one who is not able to teach would be sent forth, and when the time came, that one would be found powerful and eloquent.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
